sources.sql: 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM csrd_esrs_catalog WHERE 1=1'

'SELECT indicator_code, standard_code, disclosure_requirement, data_point_code, paragraph_ref, topic, sub_topic, indicator_name, disclosure_type, is_mandatory, module_mapping, reporting_area, related_ar, dr_full_name, conditional_or_alternative, is_voluntary, sfdr_pillar3_benchmark, phase_in_less_750, phase_in_all_undertakings, esrs_phase_in, smei_exemption, unit_of_measure, gri_disclosure_ref FR…

"SELECT module_mapping, COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE disclosure_type = 'quantitative') as quantitative, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_mandatory = true) as mandatory, array_agg(DISTINCT standard_code ORDER BY standard_code) as standards FROM csrd_esrs_catalog GROUP BY module_mapping ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC"

sources.sql: 'SELECT indicator_code, standard_code, disclosure_requirement, data_point_code, paragraph_ref, topic, sub_topic, indicator_name, indicator_description, disclosure_type, is_mandatory, is_sector_specific, applicable_sectors, esrs_phase_in, smei_exemption, unit_of_measure, preferred_unit, allowed_units, calculation_method, reference_standard, xbrl_tag, gri_equivalent, tcfd_pillar, issb_equivalent, b…
'SELECT id, legal_name, primary_sector, country_iso, created_at FROM csrd_entity_registry ORDER BY legal_name LIMIT %(lim)s'
'SELECT id, legal_name, primary_sector, country_iso, is_in_scope_csrd, csrd_first_reporting_year FROM csrd_entity_registry WHERE CAST(id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s LIMIT 1'

"SELECT SPLIT_PART(indicator_code, '-', 1) AS esrs_standard, reporting_year, COUNT(*) AS kpi_count, AVG(data_quality_score) AS avg_dq, SUM(CASE WHEN is_assured THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assured_count FROM csrd_kpi_values WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s GROUP BY esrs_standard, reporting_year ORDER BY esrs_standard, reporting_year DESC"
'SELECT gap_status, COUNT(*) FROM csrd_gap_tracker WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s GROUP BY gap_status'

'SELECT indicator_code, reporting_year, source_document_url, source_extraction_date, output_value, output_unit, tool_name FROM csrd_data_lineage WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s ORDER BY source_extraction_date DESC LIMIT 20'

'SELECT id, indicator_code, reporting_year_target, gap_status, gap_description, priority, regulatory_risk_flag, assessment_date, gap_category FROM csrd_gap_tracker WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s ORDER BY priority, indicator_code'

'SELECT indicator_code, reporting_year, numeric_value, text_value, unit, data_quality_score, status, report_page_reference, extraction_method, created_at, updated_at, is_assured, assurance_level, coverage_pct FROM csrd_kpi_values WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s ORDER BY indicator_code, reporting_year DESC'

'SELECT id, kpi_value_id, indicator_code, reporting_year, source_document_url, source_extraction_date, raw_value, raw_unit, transformation_applied, output_value, output_unit, tool_name, tool_version, calculated_by FROM csrd_data_lineage WHERE entity_registry_id = %(eid)s ORDER BY source_extraction_date DESC LIMIT %(lim)s'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gri_esrs_mapping WHERE 1=1'

'SELECT esrs_indicator_code, esrs_standard, esrs_dr, esrs_paragraph, esrs_dp_name, gri_standard, gri_disclosure, gri_sub_item, gri_dp_name, mapping_notes, mapping_quality FROM gri_esrs_mapping WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY esrs_standard, esrs_dr, esrs_paragraph LIMIT %(limit)s OFFSET %(offset)s'

sources.sql: 'SELECT esrs_indicator_code, esrs_standard, esrs_dr, esrs_paragraph, esrs_dp_name, gri_standard, gri_disclosure, gri_sub_item, gri_dp_name, mapping_notes, mapping_quality FROM gri_esrs_mapping WHERE esrs_indicator_code = %(code)s ORDER BY gri_standard, gri_disclosure'

'SELECT m.esrs_standard, COUNT(*) as total_mappings, COUNT(DISTINCT m.gri_standard) as gri_standards_used, COUNT(DISTINCT m.gri_disclosure) as gri_disclosures_used, COUNT(DISTINCT m.esrs_dr) as esrs_drs_mapped FROM gri_esrs_mapping m GROUP BY m.esrs_standard ORDER BY m.esrs_standard'
'SELECT standard_code, COUNT(*) as total_dps, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE gri_disclosure_ref IS NOT NULL) as gri_linked FROM csrd_esrs_catalog GROUP BY standard_code ORDER BY standard_code'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gri_standards WHERE is_abstract = false'

'SELECT element_id, element_name, standard_code, disclosure_code, disclosure_name, label, verbose_label, documentation, data_type, period_type, is_abstract, topic_area FROM gri_standards WHERE is_abstract = false ORDER BY standard_code, disclosure_code, element_name LIMIT %(limit)s OFFSET %(offset)s'

'SELECT standard_code, topic_area, COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_abstract = false) as concrete, COUNT(DISTINCT disclosure_code) as disclosures FROM gri_standards GROUP BY standard_code, topic_area ORDER BY standard_code'
